core_mechanism: encoding a system's global dynamics as an algebra of weighted paths through a network, where local reversible transition operators are composed along paths and feedback loops are summed/resolved by a trace (execution) operator to yield an invariant
brief_reason: The abstract frames Geometry of Interaction as an 'algebraic weighting of paths' in proof-nets treated as a 'concrete reversible computation' with an equational/algebraic theory, i.e. composing local reversible operators along network paths and closing feedback via a trace.
